findings.location: s3 — BLOBカラムのダウンロード方法
findings.description: The JSP implementation for BLOB column download is entirely omitted. The source JSP shows how to use `downloadLink` with a dynamic record list (forEach loop with `blobColumn_${status.index}` as name) and how to pass a record discriminator (`<n:param paramName="fileId" name="fileId" />`) to identify the selected record. This usage pattern — particularly passing a selector parameter inside a downloadLink — is implementation-necessary and not derivable from the action code alone.
findings.source_evidence: JSP implementation block under **BLOB型カラムのダウンロード方法**: `<n:downloadLink uri="./BlobColumn" name="blobColumn_${status.index}">` with `<n:param paramName="fileId" name="fileId" />`

findings.location: s3 — ファイルのダウンロード方法 (StreamResponse constructor comment)
findings.description: The source code comment explicitly states 'ファイルの削除はフレームワークが行う' (file deletion is performed by the framework, not the application). The knowledge file only notes '第2引数true=ダウンロード後にファイルを削除', omitting that deletion is framework-managed. An implementer may add their own deletion logic if unaware of this.
findings.source_evidence: Source comment: `// ファイルの削除はフレームワークが行う。` in the StreamResponse file download action example

findings.description: `WebView_CustomTagConfig` is referenced multiple times in s1 content (for default values of both popupWindowName and popupOption attributes) but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `popupWindowName属性が指定されない場合、:ref:\`WebView_CustomTagConfig\` で指定したデフォルト値が使用される` and footnote: `popupOption属性が指定されない場合、:ref:\`WebView_CustomTagConfig\` で指定したデフォルト値が使用される`
